CustomField.description: Number of Recurring Donation records processed per batch execution during the nightly Recurring Donation evaluation job. Default is 50. Reduce if the batch job fails due to governor limits (CPU time, heap size). The relatively low default accounts for the complex processing each Recurring Donation requires (evaluating installments, creating Opportunities, etc.).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Recurring Donations per batch during the nightly evaluation job. Default is 50. Reduce if the batch job hits governor limits.
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Batch Size
